case_title: SHERMAN, CLAY & CO. DBA MUSIC ACCEPTANCE CORP. VS KOHAL RICHARD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SHERMAN, CLAY & CO. DBA MUSIC ACCEPTANCE CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT KOHAL RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KOHAL RICHARD
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-15-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-01-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-09-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHERMAN, CLAY & CO. DBA MUSIC ACCEPTANCE CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOHAL RICHARD $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8.00, THE COURT ORDERS THE DELIVERY AND RETURN OF THE PLTF'S PIANO TO THE PLTF'S BUSINESS AT PLTF'S COST STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KOHAL RICHARD
AUTHORIZATION FROM JUDGE QUIDACHAY ORDERING WR IT OF POSS TO ISSUE & SHERIFF'S DEPT TO EXECUTE
